option.name: filePath
option.value: /ApiResponse (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
package com.example.flashcardapp.data.datasource.remote.model
data class ApiResponse<T>( val success: Boolean, val message: String?, val data: T? )

option.name: updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /AuthRepositoryImpl (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /ForgotPasswordFragment (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /MarkdownConverter (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /RegisterFragment (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /fragment_add_desk (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" tools:context=".presentation.feature.addDeck.AddDeckFragment" android:background="?attr/colorOnBackground">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/header" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:backgroundTint="?attr/colorOnBackground" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:background="@android:color/transparent" android:src="@drawable/ic_back" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:text="Tạo bộ thẻ mới" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" />
<View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:id="@+id/scroll" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:paddingTop="12dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/header" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingBottom="90dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tên bộ thẻ" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilName" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.FilledBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:boxBackgroundColor="#FFFFFF" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="20dp" app:boxStrokeWidth="0dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:hint="Ví dụ: Từ vựng IELTS" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textColorHint="?attr/subTitleColor" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:textSize="13sp" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:text="Mô tả" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilDesc" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.FilledBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:boxBackgroundColor="#FFFFFF" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="20dp" app:boxStrokeWidth="0dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etDesc" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:gravity="top|start" android:hint="Nhập mô tả ngắn gọn cho bộ thẻ này..." android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textColorHint="?attr/subTitleColor" android:padding="12dp" android:textSize="15sp" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Chủ đề --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginTop="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Chủ đề" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/btnAddTopic" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="+ Thêm mới" android:textColor="#2E6BFF" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup android:id="@+id/chipGroupTopics" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:paddingHorizontal="0dp" android:paddingVertical="8dp" app:singleSelection="false" app:chipSpacingHorizontal="8dp" app:chipSpacingVertical="8dp">
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Ngoại ngữ" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:checked="true" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_selector" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" app:checkedIconVisible="false" app:chipMinHeight="40dp" android:textColor="@color/chip_text_selector" android:textSize="13sp"/>
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Kinh tế" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_selector" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" app:checkedIconVisible="false" app:chipMinHeight="40dp" android:textColor="@color/chip_text_selector" android:textSize="13sp"/>
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Công nghệ" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_selector" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" app:checkedIconVisible="false" app:chipMinHeight="40dp" android:textColor="@color/chip_text_selector" android:textSize="13sp"/>
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Kỹ năng mềm" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_selector" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" app:checkedIconVisible="false" app:chipMinHeight="40dp" android:textColor="@color/chip_text_selector" android:textSize="13sp"/> </com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup>
<!-- Toggle công khai --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardPublic" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" app:cardCornerRadius="14dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:padding="12dp" android:background="?attr/componentBackground">
<ImageView android:layout_width="28dp" android:layout_height="28dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_public"/>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Chế độ công khai" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="15sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Cho phép người khác tìm thấy bộ thẻ" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.switchmaterial.SwitchMaterial android:id="@+id/switchPublic" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:checked="false" app:thumbTint="@color/switch_thumb_gray" app:trackTint="@color/switch_track_gray" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Banner --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="140dp" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp" android:backgroundTint="?attr/componentBackground">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@drawable/bg" android:contentDescription="@string/app_name" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
<!-- CTA bottom --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNext" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="58dp" android:layout_margin="12dp" android:text="Tiếp tục: Thêm thẻ" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:icon="@drawable/ic_back" android:backgroundTint="#2E6BFF" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" app:cornerRadius="14dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" tools:context=".presentation.feature.addDeck.AddDeckFragment" android:background="?attr/colorOnBackground">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/header" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:backgroundTint="?attr/colorOnBackground" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:background="@android:color/transparent" android:src="@drawable/ic_back" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:text="Tạo bộ thẻ mới" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" />
<View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:id="@+id/scroll" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:paddingTop="12dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/header" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingBottom="90dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tên bộ thẻ" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilName" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.FilledBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:boxBackgroundColor="#FFFFFF" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="20dp" app:boxStrokeWidth="0dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:hint="Ví dụ: Từ vựng IELTS" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textColorHint="?attr/subTitleColor" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:textSize="13sp" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:text="Mô tả" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilDesc" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.FilledBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:boxBackgroundColor="#FFFFFF" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="20dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="20dp" app:boxStrokeWidth="0dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etDesc" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:gravity="top|start" android:hint="Nhập mô tả ngắn gọn cho bộ thẻ này..." android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textColorHint="?attr/subTitleColor" android:padding="12dp" android:textSize="15sp" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Chủ đề --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginTop="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Chủ đề" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/btnAddTopic" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="+ Thêm mới" android:textColor="#2E6BFF" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup android:id="@+id/chipGroupTopics" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:paddingHorizontal="0dp" android:paddingVertical="8dp" app:singleSelection="true" app:chipSpacingHorizontal="8dp" app:chipSpacingVertical="8dp" />
<!-- Toggle công khai --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardPublic" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" app:cardCornerRadius="14dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:padding="12dp" android:background="?attr/componentBackground">
<ImageView android:layout_width="28dp" android:layout_height="28dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_public"/>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Chế độ công khai" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="15sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Cho phép người khác tìm thấy bộ thẻ" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.switchmaterial.SwitchMaterial android:id="@+id/switchPublic" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:checked="false" app:thumbTint="@color/switch_thumb_gray" app:trackTint="@color/switch_track_gray" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Banner --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="140dp" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp" android:backgroundTint="?attr/componentBackground">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@drawable/bg" android:contentDescription="@string/app_name" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
<!-- CTA bottom --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNext" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="58dp" android:layout_margin="12dp" android:text="Tiếp tục: Thêm thẻ" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:icon="@drawable/ic_back" android:backgroundTint="#2E6BFF" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" app:cornerRadius="14dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /libs.versions (snapshot).toml

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
